title: astragalus bustillosii
intro: Astragalus bustillosii, also known as Bustillos' milkvetch, is a perennial plant species belonging to the legume family and native to the southwestern United States. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Astragalus bustillosii include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and fatigue, and lower blood pressure, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health conditions. Astragalus bustillosii can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, capsules, and tinctures, which are available in health food stores or online.
